title: DNA Extraction from Modern Dental Plaque on Gauze
author: Franziska Aron
materials: Retrieve the spin filter columns (provided in the kit) from fridge to warm them up to Room temperature for use at step 25 "provided in the kit" refers to: DNeasy PowerSoil Kit (100) Cat No./ID: 12888-100 A spin filter column is a spin filter unit sitting in a collection column. The spin filter unit contains the membrane.
Gently shake C4 Solution to mix

steps.title: Place a 1
steps.instruction: Place a 1.5ml/2ml tube rack at 4 °C for the incubation steps on the final days

steps.title: Label for each sample one 2ml-Eppendorf...
steps.instruction: Label for each sample one 2ml-Eppendorf Safe-Lock DNA LoBind-Tube and one 1.5ml-Eppendorf Safe-Lock DNA LoBind-Tube

steps.title: Label for each sample one Power...
steps.instruction: Label for each sample one Power Bead tube, one spin filter column and three 2ml collection tubes (all provided in the kit). Be sure to label both the top and sides of the PowerSoil bead tube. The labeling on the top may be rubbed off during bead-beating with the Omni BeadRuptor.

steps.title: Invert the PowerSoil bead tubes to...
steps.instruction: Invert the PowerSoil bead tubes to mix and fully submerge gauze with plaque.

steps.title: Add 60 µL C1 solution, invert several times to mix
steps.instruction: Add 60 µL C1 solution, invert several times to mix.

steps.title: Place tubes in an OmniBeadRuptor, secure...
steps.instruction: Place tubes in an OmniBeadRuptor, secure them, and close the lid. Run the BeadRuptor at 2.9 m/s for 00:10:00 Make sure the Power Bead tubes are secure, but do not close the securing lid too tightly, 2.9 m/s is the maximum, otherwise the tubes may break.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 9400 x g, °C...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 9400 x g, °C for 00:00:30 at Room temperature

steps.title: Transfer 600 µL supernatant to the...
steps.instruction: Transfer 600 µL supernatant to the 2ml collection tube (provided in the kit), but leave the gauze in the bead tube. Be careful not to transfer any beads or dust from the beads.

steps.title: Save power bead tubes at -20 °C as backup
steps.instruction: Save power bead tubes at -20 °C as backup. We save this as backup until confirmation that the extraction worked. If extraction was successful, this can be discarded.

steps.title: Add 200 µL C3 solution and vortex briefly
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL C3 solution and vortex briefly

steps.title: Incubate the tubes at 4 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes at 4 °C for 00:05:00 on the pre-cooled rack ( 4 °C )

steps.title: Centrifuge the tubes at 9400 x...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tubes at 9400 x g, °C for 00:01:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: Transfer 750 µL of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer 750 µL of the supernatant to a clean 2ml collection tube (provided in the kit)

steps.title: Store remaining supernatant at -20 °C...
steps.instruction: Store remaining supernatant at -20 °C We save this as backup until confirmation that the extraction worked. If extraction was successful, this can be discarded.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.2 mL C4 Solution to supernatant and vortex for 00:00:05 The solution should not exceed the rim of the tube.

steps.title: Bind the DNA on the membrane of spin filter unit:
steps.instruction: Bind the DNA on the membrane of spin filter unit:

steps.title: Load approximately 675 µL into spin filter unit
steps.instruction: Load approximately 675 µL into spin filter unit

steps.title: Centrifuge 00:01:00 at 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 00:01:00 at 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature

steps.title: Repeat until the entire solution has...
steps.instruction: Repeat until the entire solution has been passed through the spin filter unit (2-3 times) go to step #21.1

steps.title: Load 500 µL C5 Solution into spin filter unit
steps.instruction: Load 500 µL C5 Solution into spin filter unit

steps.title: Centrifuge 00:01:00 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 00:01:00 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature

steps.title: Dry spin 00:01:00 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Dry spin 00:01:00 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature

steps.title: Place the spin filter unit into...
steps.instruction: Place the spin filter unit into a clean 2mL collection tube (provided in the kit), or if preferred, a 1.5 mL LoBind tube

steps.title: Pipette 100 µL C6 Solution (pre-warmed...
steps.instruction: Pipette 100 µL C6 Solution (pre-warmed to 37 °C ) into center of the membrane in the spin filter unit and incubate for 00:01:00

steps.title: Centrifuge 9400 x g, °C for 00:00:30 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 9400 x g, °C for 00:00:30 at Room temperature

steps.title: Remove spin filter unit and quantify...
steps.instruction: Remove spin filter unit and quantify the DNA ( 3 µL ) with the Qubit ds BR Kit following the manufacturer's protocol

steps.title: Store the eluate at -20 °C
steps.instruction: Store the eluate at -20 °C

steps.title: Sterilize scissors by wiping with 75%...
steps.instruction: Sterilize scissors by wiping with 75% ethanol, and then wiping them with HPLC water, then wipe dry. Use the scissors to clip a small piece of gauze with plaque. Do not take more than half of the plaque, in case more is needed for another extraction later.

steps.title: Add 25 µL proteinase K (...
steps.instruction: Add 25 µL proteinase K ( 10 mg/mL ), and rotate tubes several times to mix.

steps.title: Place solution C6 in an incubator...
steps.instruction: Place solution C6 in an incubator to pre-heat it to 37 °C .

steps.title: Make two extraction blank PowerSoil bead...
steps.instruction: Make two extraction blank PowerSoil bead tubes per extraction batch, one with nothing added, and a second with a small section of sterile gauze added.

steps.title: Place the piece of gauze with...
steps.instruction: Place the piece of gauze with plaque in a PowerSoil bead tube using forceps sterilized by wiping with 75% ethanol, and then wiping them with sterile water. Change gloves and sterilize scissors and forceps between each sample.
